description: Downloads llama.cpp binaries (CUDA, AVX2, KoboldCPP), extracts to dev directory, adds to PATH, and interactively downloads GGUF/GGML models from a 69-model catalog via aria2c.

messages.scriptDisabled: llama.cpp installation is disabled in config.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Binaries and model tracking removed.
messages.hardwareDetecting: Detecting hardware capabilities (CUDA GPU, AVX2 CPU)...
messages.hwSkipped: [{slug}] Skipped: requires {requires} (not detected on this system)
messages.hwSkippedSummary: {count} executable variant(s) skipped due to hardware incompatibility.
messages.checksumSkipped: No SHA256 checksum configured for {fileName}, skipping verification.

commands.all: Download all executables + interactive model picker (default)
commands.models: Interactive model picker -- choose which GGUF/GGML models to download
commands.uninstall: Remove all binaries, clean PATH, purge tracking
